flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Randolph College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (48.9% → 40.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Randolph College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (56.0% → 46.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Randolph College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.9k → $30.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Randolph College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.9k → $30.3k).
